---
title: "Project Telemetry"
image: man/figures/vignette-telemetry.svg
author: "John Gavin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    code-fold: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Project Telemetry}
  %\VignetteEngine: quarto::html
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}
{{< include ../../_includes/pages-nav.qmd >}}

Telemetry for the `llm` project, split across the pages linked above: LLM
usage and costs, session efficiency, pipeline metrics, GitHub activity,
project structure, and prediction calibration. All figures and tables are
pre-computed by the targets pipeline and read via `safe_tar_read()`.
